claimDetail.text: Russian troops have liberated Bohodarivka in Dnipropetrovsk region, according to the Ministry of Defense.
The 'Vostok' group is advancing and has captured the village of Pisantsy and nearby Bogodarovka.
Russian troops have liberated the settlements of Pisantsy and Novoselovka during offensive operations.
Russian air defense forces shot down 209 Ukrainian drones overnight, according to the Ministry of Defense.
More than 10 drones were shot down approaching Moscow since the start of the day.

Russia has begun a combined missile and drone attack on Ukraine, targeting Kyiv and surrounding areas.
Missile strikes were reported in Kyiv with multiple impacts in the city.
Air raid alerts and explosions were reported in Kyiv, indicating drone activity.
Ukrainian drones destroyed several trucks in Donetsk Oblast.
A Ukrainian drone strike has destroyed a group of Russian transports in Donetsk Oblast.
Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles struck Russia's Titan-Barrikady plant, which manufactures missile systems.
Ukraine reportedly struck the Research Institute for Physical Measurements in Penza, which manufactures control systems for Russian military forces.
Ukrainian drones attacked facilities in Penza and Ufa, causing fires and damage to a defense plant and a refinery.
During the night, Russian air defense intercepted and destroyed 179 Ukrainian drones over multiple regions.
Russian air defense forces shot down 133 Ukrainian drones between 8 AM and 8 PM.
